LanguageData.AnomaliesExpected.ObeliskClockwork.Messa: {0} has adapted to the decoy's frequency. We must initiate fresh research to find alternative.
LanguageData.AnomaliesExpected.ObeliskClockwork.Place: Place a speedometer into the obelisk.
Insert a real speedometer into the obelisk's socket. Speedometer must be placed next to obelisk. [Will destroy both]
Place a decoy speedometer into the obelisk.
Insert a specially designed device that simulates the speedometer's chrono-effect frequency into the obelisk's socket. Decoy must be placed next to obelisk. [Will destroy it]
Research to find decoy's frequency not finished.
LanguageData.AnomaliesExpected.ObeliskClockwork.EndGa:
[High Level Access Required]

{0} used highest mode of speedometer and attempted to attack {1} through socket. Pure energy from attack was enough to crack surface of {1} and some parts one of clock hands fall nearby. Speedometer capture mechanism was activated merging {0} with {1}, thus moving back to the confindment space pocket. 

[Perception-based error detected]

{0} no longer affected by limitations of time and space, being everywhere and nowhere. As if they never existed.
LanguageData.AnomaliesExpected.ObeliskClockwork.Clock: Your colonists noticed some objects on a ground. We don't know where it come from, but it looks like parts of a giant clockwork.
